issues.description: Condition missing: 'If your opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you' should be a condition, not Always
Action incomplete: GiveDon must include rest:true to reflect 'rest it' in card text
Condition missing: 'If your opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you' should be a condition, not Always
Action incomplete: GiveDon must include rest:true to reflect 'rest it' in card text

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play]/[When Attacking] If your opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
